# Session handoff — READ FIRST (<YYYY-MM-DD>) · 🎯 <active WU + one-line objective>

<!-- The curated cold-start brief. Regenerated by /handoff, verified by /orient. If this file is
     >24h old or contradicts the repo, re-/orient before trusting it. Does NOT auto-commit. -->

## Project in one paragraph
{{PROJECT_ONE_LINER}} <+ the current initiative, branch, and the single most important thing a fresh
session must know before touching anything.>

## Current state summary
<A compact table or list: each active work-unit / leg and its state (committed / built-not-integrated /
parked / blocked).>

## ⚠️ Anti-assumptions / traps (load-bearing)
<The things a fresh agent will get WRONG by default — stale figures, a parked diff that must not be
integrated, a tool that lies under condition X, a never-stage file. One line each; this section earns
its keep.>

## Immediate next steps
<The ordered resume queue, actionable cold. Step 0 first. Include the exact commands / gate recipe if
non-obvious. State the do-NOT (e.g. do not push without an explicit go).>

## Detour-chain (the side-quest stack)
<MAIN objective → side-quest → nested side-quest (what spawned it → what it found → resolved/open), so
the next session can climb back up to the original objective. Surface this on "where were we?".>

## Recent decisions made
| When | Decision | Ref |
|---|---|---|

## Obligations (single-party form — omit this section when `now/obligations.md` exists)

     apply-default FORBIDDEN on HARD operator/authorization rows) — source. I-owe bullets:
